generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
unauthorized: You must be signed in to do that.
forbidden: You don’t have access to this resource.
badRequest: Some of the information provided is invalid.
rateLimited: You’re doing that too fast — please slow down and try again in a moment.
rateLimitedIn: You’re going too fast — try again in {time}.
internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

rule.future: You can't log a day that hasn't happened yet.
rule.notScheduled: This rule is not scheduled for that day.

execution.invalidDate: One of the executions has an invalid date.
